# Autonomous Ads Cards

Converted from `73_autonomous_ads_cards.html` so the pack remains Markdown-only.

```html
<!doctype html>
<html><head><meta charset='utf-8'><title>Autonomous Ads Cards</title>
<style>body{font-family:Arial, sans-serif; margin:40px; line-height:1.5;} .grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(260px,1fr));gap:16px}.card{border:1px solid #ccc;border-radius:10px;padding:16px} h1{margin-top:0}</style></head><body>
<h1>Autonomous Ads Cards</h1><div class='grid'>
<div class='card'><h2>Claim-led generation</h2><p>Use when scaling safely. Mindset: creativity inside truth boundaries.</p></div>
<div class='card'><h2>Proof-path generation</h2><p>Use for skeptical/technical buyers. Mindset: ad earns inspection; proof earns belief.</p></div>
<div class='card'><h2>Search-intent generation</h2><p>Use for active demand. Mindset: answer the query with minimum friction.</p></div>
<div class='card'><h2>DCO</h2><p>Use with enough data and strong constraints. Mindset: feed the machine good ingredients.</p></div>
<div class='card'><h2>Bandits</h2><p>Use to balance learning and earning. Mindset: keep exploration alive.</p></div>
<div class='card'><h2>Policy gate</h2><p>Use before every launch. Mindset: compliance enables safe scale.</p></div>
<div class='card'><h2>L4 autonomy</h2><p>Use for low-risk approved campaign families. Mindset: bounded autonomy beats ungoverned speed.</p></div>
<div class='card'><h2>Auto-pause</h2><p>Use for tracking/policy/spend failures. Mindset: prevent damage before optimizing.</p></div>
</div></body></html>
```
